## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on ongoing projects and align on future collaboration between Surge AI and GrowthX teams.](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shift focus to data annotation (DA) and events; content creation less prioritized due to Surge AI's specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
  - [Video content from existing podcasts identified as high-value opportunity for social media](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [New York and Seattle events progressing; list creation and venue selection underway](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Meeting cadence to be adjusted: work stream-specific meetings to handle details, this sync potentially moving to bi-weekly](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Pivot

  - [Surge AI team writes most content in-house due to specific expertise required](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=187.0)
  - [GrowthX to explore repurposing existing content (e.g., from podcasts) for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Focus shifting away from creating new content to supporting DA and events](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

### Video Content Opportunity

  - [GrowthX to create short video clips from existing podcast footage for Surge AI's social media](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Potential to repurpose footage from paused video project into self-contained shorts](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Mason: "videos is something that I have no time to think about, so like that would be the biggest unlock"](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### Events Planning Progress

  - [New York dinner event: Gloria compiling list of potential attendees, including AIE Summit speakers](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Seattle event confirmed to proceed; Sully scouting venues this week](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Canlis considered as high-end option, but dress code concerns for engineer attendees](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)
  - [San Francisco Teeny Dinner currently on hold](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=867.0)

### Data Annotation (DA) Project

  - [Work kicked off last week, focusing on generating organic traffic](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Content quality bar set for general audience, not search-optimized](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Akash to be added to future meetings for this workstream](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)

### Leaderboard Development

  - [GrowthX team working on differentiated leaderboard concept for Surge AI](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Mason shared screenshots of coding leaderboard examples](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [Renato requested full screenshots of homepage and detail page when available](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### CRM and Attendee Management

  - [GrowthX to create external lists of potential event attendees](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Will help automate outreach process if it becomes unwieldy for Surge AI team](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=1033.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Adjust meeting cadence: potentially move this sync to bi-weekly](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [Gloria to finalize attendee lists for New York and Seattle events](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Gloria to follow up with Sully on signage approval for upcoming events (deadline: Tuesday/Wednesday next week)](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=928.0)
  - [GrowthX team to create video clips from existing podcast content](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Explore repurposing content from paused video project into short-form content](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [Continue work on data annotation and leaderboard projects](https://fathom.video/share/zf-4urTDAVnfV7spyMfWgwCsyvj7b6Bh?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
